body.title: CLOSED: ADC action log — adc.action_log table + shared logger module
body.result: adc.action_log table + append_action() fire-and-forget logger; 4 integration tests
body.description:
All action tools (shell_exec, file_rw, file_ticket, propose_change) need a shared audit trail so the nighttime auditor has something to review. No action_log table or module exists in ADC yet.

Proposed shape: Create `adc.action_log` Postgres table (id SERIAL PK, device_id TEXT, tool_name TEXT, args_json JSONB, result_summary TEXT, ts TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), duration_ms INT, exit_code INT NULL). Add `agent_datacenter/action_log.py` with `append_action(device_id, tool_name, args_dict, result_summary, duration_ms, exit_code=None)` — fire-and-forget, never raises. Migration in `agent_datacenter/db/migrations/`.

**Affected files:** new `agent_datacenter/action_log.py`, new migration file in `agent_datacenter/db/migrations/`
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; postgres-only; append_action is fire-and-forget (never blocks callers)
**Scope boundary:** Schema + logger module only. No tools yet, no auditor. Other tools depend on this — sprint first.
**Test plan:** test that append_action inserts a row with correct fields; test graceful no-op when DB unavailable (exception caught internally).
